justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'Thursday afternoon' as June 4th, 1 PM to 5 PM, and then expanded the search to 1 PM to 7 PM, demonstrating a good understanding of the user's temporal preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made two separate calls to check availability, first for 1 PM to 5 PM and then for 1 PM to 7 PM, which could have been combined into a single, broader search from the start.
